title: Circuit breakers + cost/usage tracking
spec: Implement circuit breakers + usage tracking. CONSTRAINT: Helm runs on the Claude Max subscription via `claude -p` (NO API key, NO paid SDK) — usage tracking is notional/token-based only; never add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Build: workspace/tools/circuit-breaker.mjs (CircuitBreaker: closed -> open after 5 consecutive failures, half-open probe after 60s; state in workspace/tools/circuit-state.db) and wrap the call() dispatcher in workspace/tools/tools.mjs. workspace/costs/cost-tracker.mjs: append {ts, model, prompt_chars, output_chars, est_tokens} to workspace/costs/costs.db after claude runs; getCostSummary(since). Add a `/cost` command to index.js (returns today's table). Add maxIterations + maxWallTime guards to the swarm/think loops where missing. RULES: keep `node workspace/tests/smoke.mjs` green and add a unique-numbered check; `node --check index.js imessage.js` clean; minimal; NEVER touch ~/helm. Output what you built.

title: Plan-before-act + autonomy modes + confidence signaling
spec: In index.js + workspace/CLAUDE.md: for any task >2 shell commands or that touches files/git, Helm first replies a short numbered plan and waits for go (in `autopilot` mode auto-proceed after 60s). Add `!mode suggest|copilot|autopilot` handled in index.js, stored as preference `helm.autonomy_mode` in memory.db (read it at message time). Add confidence-signaling guidance to CLAUDE.md ([confident]/[uncertain]/[guessing] on factual claims). Mostly behavior + a small command. RULES: smoke stays green + add a check (e.g. !mode round-trips the preference); node --check clean; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: Memory intelligence: BM25 + temporal validity + LLM consolidation
spec: Upgrade workspace/memory. recall: replace/augment TF-IDF with BM25 scoring + RRF fusion with the existing embedding cosine (score = 1/(60+bm25_rank) + 1/(60+cos_rank)) + 1.3x boost when a fact key matches query tokens. KEEP recall JSON output shape identical. Temporal validity: ALTER facts ADD valid_from, expired_at; `remember` inserts a new row and sets expired_at on the superseded one (log an episode 'fact superseded'); recall filters WHERE expired_at IS NULL; add a `history <key>` verb. Add access_count (bumped on recall hit) and fold log1p(access_count) into consolidate.mjs decay. Extend the weekly think pass to LLM-consolidate the last 7 days of episodes into facts. RULES: smoke green + add checks (BM25 ranking, temporal supersede, output-shape unchanged); model-download NOT required at test; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: GUI hardening: Retina guiclick + verify loop + Playwright MCP
spec: bin/guiclick: detect the display scale (system_profiler SPDisplaysDataType) and divide screenshot pixel coords by it before calling bin/guicontrol click; log the translation. workspace/tools/impl/gui_task.mjs: guiStep(action, description, maxRetries=3) -> run action, screencapture, `claude -p` verify 'did <description> succeed? YES/NO', retry on NO with failure classification (WRONG_ELEMENT/NOT_FOUND/PAGE_NOT_LOADED/AUTH_WALL); register in tools registry. Add a playwright entry to workspace/mcp/servers.json (npx -y @playwright/mcp@latest --headless). Update the CLAUDE.md GUI section to use guiclick + the verify loop. RULES: smoke green + a check that needs NO Screen Recording/Accessibility/network; node --check clean; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: Subscription-safe model routing (replaces the SDK/caching item)
spec: Helm must stay on the Max subscription via `claude -p` — do NOT migrate to the Anthropic SDK or add an API key. Instead add task-complexity model routing: a small classifier in index.js (classifyComplexity(text) -> 'haiku'|'sonnet'|'opus' by keyword/length heuristics) that picks --model per message (route trivial/classify/format/short to a cheaper model, keep opus for building/coding/long tasks); make it overridable by a `!model <name>` command + a preference. Keep the system prompt ordering stable so `claude -p`'s built-in prompt caching stays warm. RULES: smoke green + a check (classifyComplexity returns valid tiers); node --check clean; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: Swarm 2.0: surgical edits + localize-repair + critic gate
spec: Upgrade the build swarm. workspace/swarm/apply-edit.mjs: parse <<<OLD / === / >>>NEW fenced edits from agent output, apply via exact String.replace (error if zero or >1 match), auto-revert via `git checkout` if `node --check` fails, feed the diff back. Bounded ACI tool wrappers in workspace/swarm/tools/ (view_file 100-line window, search_repo returns file list, search_file capped matches). workspace/swarm/coding-task.mjs: two-phase localize (claude -p -> {file,lines}) then repair with only those excerpts. Add a critic gate to the swarm before merge (claude -p 'review this diff: PASS/FAIL + issues'; on FAIL don't merge, attach critique). RULES: smoke green + a check; node --check clean; do not break the existing swarm.mjs flow; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: Context management: anchored summarization + handoff payloads
spec: workspace/sessions/compact.mjs: when a session passes ~60% of a token budget, run `claude -p` to summarize into session_anchor.json {intent, changes_made, decisions, next_steps, constraints}; the scheduler/think can trigger it after long sessions. Define a swarm HANDOFF_SCHEMA ({worker_id, task, artifacts, key_findings, decisions, open_questions, confidence}); workers write handoff.json, the orchestrator reads that instead of raw stdout. In long swarm runs, replace file-read results older than ~3 turns with a short '[file read: path, N lines - dropped]' note. RULES: smoke green + a check; node --check clean; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: Proactive interrupt gate + async DM receipts
spec: think.mjs: add computeInterruptScore(finding, recentActivity, activeGoals) (urgency from deadline keywords, relevance from a memory recall score) and only call bin/helm-push when score > 0.65 — keep it quiet otherwise. bin/helm-notify: a wrapper all scheduled jobs call on exit, sending a concise DONE DM via helm-push.mjs with {task, duration, files_changed, summary}. RULES: stay non-spammy; smoke green + a check (computeInterruptScore thresholds); node --check clean; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: Planning engine: DAG parallelism + reflexion retry + replan
spec: workspace/plans/plan.mjs + plans.db: ALTER steps ADD deps TEXT DEFAULT '[]'; ADD a checkpoints table (plan_id, step_id, state_json, created_at). `next` returns ALL runnable steps (deps satisfied) + the latest checkpoint. `complete` writes a checkpoint and, on a failed step, runs a `claude -p` reflexion ('one-line diagnosis + fix'), inserts a retry step (max 2) then escalates. Add a `replan` verb (regenerate remaining steps from goal+progress+failure; cap replan_count at 3) and step-result propagation (store stdout, substitute into later steps). RULES: smoke green + a create->add-step->next->complete->replan round-trip check; node --check clean; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: MCP expansion: GitHub + Calendar/Gmail + Brave, with health checks
spec: workspace/mcp/servers.json: add github (PAT read from the secrets vault), google-workspace (Calendar + Gmail scopes only, creds from vault), brave-search (key from vault) — each runnable via npx. workspace/mcp/check.mjs: iterate servers, run a health check, report UP/DOWN, called at bot startup; the bot must still start if a server is down (graceful). Extend the server schema with healthCheck/enabled. Document in CLAUDE.md. RULES: do NOT hardcode any secret (read from vault at runtime); smoke must pass WITHOUT network/keys (check JSON valid + check.mjs imports); node --check clean; NEVER touch ~/helm.

title: Reverse-engineering capability
spec: Add a reverse-engineering tool: workspace/tools/impl/reverse.mjs, registered in workspace/tools/registry.json, that analyzes a target and writes a structured report to workspace/reverse/<name>-report.md. Subcommands: (a) `web <url>` — drive Playwright/WebFetch to load the page, capture network/XHR calls, extract API endpoints + request/response shapes + detected stack/libraries, and output a spec plus a clone scaffold outline; (b) `app <path>` — for a macOS .app/binary use file/strings/otool -L/Info.plist (and on Windows the equivalents) to summarize frameworks, entitlements, structure; (c) `file <path>` — infer format from magic bytes + hexdump heuristics and summarize structure. ETHICS: for the OWNER'S OWN or clearly authorized targets only; the report must note this. Keep heavy tools lazy/guarded so they aren't needed at test time. Document usage in CLAUDE.md. RULES: smoke green + a check (tool registered + module imports without running anything heavy); node --check clean; NEVER touch ~/helm.
